meanings.definition: Eurasian herb having small yellow flowers and red roots formerly an important source of the dye alizarin
color a moderate to strong red

examples: she gets mad when you wake her up so early
a man who had gone mad

meanings.definition: marked by uncontrolled excitement or emotion
examples: a crowd of delirious baseball fans
took insane risks behind the wheel
a completely mad scheme to build a bridge between two mountains
